things.name: OCT Loft Creative Culture Park
things.description: Former factory complex transformed into Shenzhen's coolest art and design district

things.name: Window of the World Theme Park
things.description: 130 scale-model world landmarks including the Eiffel Tower and the Taj Mahal

things.description: Village of 8,000 artists producing high-quality reproductions and original contemporary art

things.name: Huaqiangbei Electronics Market
things.description: World's largest electronics market spanning multiple buildings with every component imaginable

things.name: Splendid China Folk Village
things.description: Miniature replicas of China's famous sites alongside cultural performances

things.name: Shenzhen Bay Park
things.description: 13km coastal park with a cycling track, wetlands and views across to Hong Kong

things.name: Lianhua Mountain Park
things.description: Hilltop park with Deng Xiaoping statue and panoramic views over modern Shenzhen

things.name: Happy Valley Theme Park
things.description: Thrill rides and roller coasters in China's most popular amusement park chain

things.name: Dapeng Fortress
things.description: Ming-dynasty coastal fortress town with well-preserved streets and ancestral halls

things.name: Shenzhen Museum of Contemporary Art
things.description: World-class contemporary art space in the new Futian cultural district
